title: STAT+: Novo reports ‘triple G’ obesity drug study results
author: Elaine Chen
fullText:
The company said that one of its experimental obesity drugs helped patients lose nearly 20% of their weight after 24 weeks in a midstage trial
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Adobe

 
 

 Want to stay on top of the science and politics driving biotech today? Sign up to get our biotech newsletter in your inbox.

Good morning. I hope everyone on the East Coast is staying warm. Let’s get into the news today.

How low can obesity drug prices go?

Novo Nordisk has decided to cut by as much as half the U.S. list prices of its weight loss and diabetes drugs Wegovy and Ozempic — escalating an ongoing pricing war with its chief rival Eli Lilly.

 National Biotech Reporter
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Elaine Chen covers biotech, co-writes The Readout newsletter, and co-hosts STAT’s weekly biotech podcast, The Readout Loud. You can reach Elaine on Signal at elaineywchen.70.
summary: Fresh off a failed trial that sent its shares plummeting, Novo Nordisk said that one of its experimental obesity drugs helped patients lose nearly 20% of their weight after 24 weeks…
